Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi Bus L41 Timings ADNEC to Corniche Hospital

August 5, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus L41 is one of the essential routes as it connects ADNEC (Abu Dhabi National Exhibition Centre) to Corniche Hospital, passing through many key points of the city. This guide provides a step-by-step overview of the L41 route with operational timings, major stops, and travel tips for smooth travel.

Contents

Operational Details

Below is the detailed schedule for Bus L41 departing from both ADNEC and Corniche Hospital:

From ADNEC From Corniche Hospital
05:15 05:15
05:30 05:30
05:45 05:45
05:59 05:59
06:13 06:13
06:28 06:28
06:43 06:43
06:58 06:58
07:09 07:11
07:24 07:26
07:39 07:41
07:54 07:56
08:12 08:12
08:42 08:42
09:12 09:12
09:42 09:42
10:12 10:12
10:42 10:42
11:11 11:11
11:41 11:41
12:11 12:11
12:41 12:41
13:10 13:10
13:40 13:40
14:10 14:09
14:40 14:39
15:10 15:10
15:40 15:40
15:55 15:55
16:09 16:10
16:24 16:40
16:39 16:55
16:54 17:06
17:08 17:21
17:23 17:36
17:38 17:51
17:53 18:06
18:09 18:21
18:24 18:36
18:39 18:51
18:54 19:08
19:11 19:23
19:26 19:38
19:41 19:53

20:42 21:12
21:14 21:42
21:44 22:13
22:15 22:43
22:45 23:14
23:16 23:44
23:46  

Download PDF Bus L41

Bus L41 TimetableFor complete timings, you can check the official website of AD Mobility or visit this link L41 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: The Hafilat Card can be used for payments and standard fares are AED 2 per journey within a single zone and additional fares for longer distances. For increased convenience, cards can be recharged at kiosks or online.

Route Overview

Bus L41 serves a variety of key stops, providing access to essential services and prominent landmarks across Abu Dhabi:

  1. ADNEC: Starting point near the exhibition center.

  2. Zayed Military Hospital: Access to specialized medical services.

  3. Wakr Street: A bustling commercial area.

  4. Ministry of Foreign Trade: Important government office.

  5. Rabdan Street: Connecting residential and business hubs.

6.

  1. Immigration Department: Key government facility.

  2. ITC Bus Depot: Transfer point for other routes.

  3. Hazaa Bin Zayed Street: A vital city artery.

  4. Al Falah Street: Access to residential and commercial areas.

  5. Etisalat: Stop near the telecommunications provider.

  6. Hamdan Street: A lively district with shops and businesses.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Central Souq: A cultural hub with traditional markets.

  2. Liwa Center: Popular for retail and dining options.

  3. Ministry of Economy: Key government office.

16.

17.

  1. Hazaa Bin Zayed Mosque: A blend of traditional and modern Islamic architecture.

  2. Al Mirji Street: A link to residential neighborhoods.

  3. Corniche Hospital: Final stop near healthcare facilities and close to Corniche Beach.

Another bus route in Abu Dhabi you can check out is X60 bus route which is from Abu Dhabi Bus Station to Liwa Mezaira’a Bus Station.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Some notable attractions along the L41 route include:

  1. Mishrif Mall: A shopping and dining hub.

2.

  1. Corniche Hospital: Proximity to Abu Dhabi’s scenic Corniche.

Journey Experience

The bus goes through landmarks such as Mushrif Mall, Central Souq, Hamdan Street and other landmarks and passengers can enjoy bustling markets, the vast buildings, lively streets as the bus passes by.

Notable stop near Al Mariah Mall is also an excuse for detour into luxury shopping and dining, or admire the combination of traditional and contemporary Islamic design of the Hazaa Bin Zayed mosque. A route along that will provide easy access to Corniche Beach for relaxation. The dynamics of moving to another city are at full swing here; from a commute to a cultural experience Abu Dhabi manages to effortlessly fuse tradition and modernity.

Travel Tips for Bus L41

  • Plan Your Trip: Real time updates are available through the AD Mobility app.
  • Off-Peak Travel: Plan your ride during off rush hours for a quieter ride.
  • Cashless Payments: Make sure you have enough top up on your Hafilat Card.

ADNEC provides an important link of Abu Dhabi Bus Routes with bus L41 between ADNEC and Corniche Hospital for the residents and visitors of Abu Dhabi. Bus L41 is a reliable and comfortable journey, whether you are commuting to work or leisure.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 5, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej

Al Khaleej is the lead editor at Dubai Time — covering UAE transport, banking, visa services, and city guides. Trusted by residents and expats across the Emirates for accurate, up-to-date local information.
